channel.title: Triple Helix Robotics Publications
channel.description: Technical writeups, newsletters, CAD releases, robot reveals, and more from FRC Team 2363.

item.title: wpilog-mcp: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server for WPILib Logs
item.description: Ever wondered why your robot died with 30 seconds left? Or why auto worked in practice but not in competition? wpilog-mcp lets you ask those questions in plain English. Load your…

item.title: 2026 preseason CAD release
item.description: Triple Helix developed new models for a swerve robot frame and bumpers. The team plans to use these designs in the upcoming 2026 FIRST Robotics Competition season.

item.title: Genome Pi (2025) CAD release
item.description: Latest complete CAD model of Genome Pi, the Triple Helix robot for the 2025 FIRST Robotics Competition game, Reefscape.

item.title: Genome Xi (2023) CAD release
item.description: Latest complete CAD model of Genome Xi, the Triple Helix robot for the 2023 FIRST Robotics Competition game, Charged Up.

item.title: Press release: Triple Helix seeking workspace
item.description: Award-winning high school robotics team Triple Helix Robotics is seeking a new workspace on the Peninsula. Based at Menchville High School in Newport News since 2007, the…

item.description: The 2023 FIRST Championship in Houston, Texas featured 619 FIRST Robotics Competition (FRC) teams from around the world, or approximately 18% of all active FRC teams. Attending…

item.title: Making robust LED strip lights
item.description: LED strip lights look great on your robot, and can be used to communicate robot state to your drivers, so they never need to look away from the bot. But, the strips are vulnerable…

item.description: This weekend in Portsmouth, Triple Helix Robotics steamed to another victory on the FRC playing field, captaining our alliance of three teams to bring home our 6th win in a row in…

item.title: Standard software suite for team laptops
item.description: When setting up new laptops for the team, Triple Helix installs the following suite of programs. All laptops - Clean install of Windows 10 or higher - Google Chrome FRC driver…

item.description: Triple Helix coaches used this handout to track the team's progression through the double-elimination-style playoff bracket at FIRST Robotics Competition events in 2023.

item.description: 2015 summer development project - Butterfly drive - Mode 1: 6 wheeled west coast drive with 4" colsons - Mode 2: 4 wheel drive with 4" omni wheels

item.description: What better way to "make it loud" than with a car themed for your robotics team? With a thumping custom audio system, of course...

item.title: DIY 'encoder stage' for VersaPlanetary
item.description: A procedure for adding a hall-effect gear tooth sensor within the input stage of a VexPro VersaPlanetary gearbox. Requires modification of several inexpensive COTS parts; these…

item.title: Doc Ock arm shaft failure
item.description: A shaft within our 'Doc Ock' arm failed quite spectacularly in our second qualification match of the 2015 Virginia Regional. Here's an in-depth look at what happened.
